heading: Failure to file partnership return
label: 6698 Failure to file partnership return
notes: Inflation Adjusted Items for Certain YearsFor inflation adjustment of certain items in this section, see Revenue Procedures listed in a table under .section 1 of this title

Modification of Penalty for Failure To File Partnership Returns, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–141, § 2121 Stat. 1802Dec. 19, 2007“For any return of a partnership required to be filed under section 6031 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 for a taxable year beginning in 2008, the dollar amount in effect under section 6698(b)(1) of such Code shall be increased by $1.”

children.text: fails to file such return, or such report, at the time prescribed therefor (determined with regard to any extension of time for filing), or
files a return or a report which fails to show the information required under section 6031 or 6226(b)(4)(A), respectively,
the number of persons who were partners in the partnership during any part of the taxable year.

children.heading: Assessment of penalty
children.label: c Assessment of penalty
children.text: The penalty imposed by subsection (a) shall be assessed against the partnership.

children.heading: Deficiency procedures not to apply
children.label: d Deficiency procedures not to apply
children.text: Subchapter B of chapter 63 (relating to deficiency procedures for income, estate, gift, and certain excise taxes) shall not apply in respect of the assessment or collection of any penalty imposed by subsection (a).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the case of any return required to be filed in a calendar year beginning after 2014, the $195 dollar amount under subsection (b)(1) shall be increased by an amount equal to such dollar amount multiplied by the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for the calendar year determined by substituting “calendar year 2013” for “calendar year 2016” in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

children.heading: Rounding
children.label: 2 Rounding
children.text: If any amount adjusted under paragraph (1) is not a multiple of $5, such amount shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $5.
